name: linear-milestones-write
description: Create and update Linear project milestones via CLI (write operations)
capabilities: Create new milestones with name, description, and target date
Update existing milestone name, description, or target date
Resolve projects by name using partial case-insensitive matching
Output results in JSON or human-readable format
Get help information for all command options
author: Bind
securitySummary: Straightforward CLI wrapper skill for Linear milestone management. The static scanner flagged 57 pattern matches in documentation/metadata files, but ALL are false positives. The skill has no actual code files (only metadata), and all flagged items are legitimate references to API configuration, markdown code formatting, or UUID strings in documentation. Capabilities are consistent with stated purpose.
valueStatement: Managing project milestones manually in Linear takes time and context switching. This skill lets you create and update milestones directly from the command line using simple flags and arguments.
limitations: Only supports write operations (create and update)
Milestone IDs must be UUIDs (use list-milestones to find them)
Bun runtime must be installed on the system

useCases.title: Plan release cycles
useCases.description: Create milestones with target dates for release planning and tracking

useCases.title: Track sprint goals
useCases.description: Define milestones for sprint endings and update progress as work completes

useCases.title: Automate milestone workflows
useCases.description: Script milestone creation and updates as part of deployment pipelines

promptTemplates.title: Create milestone
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a milestone called v2.0 Release in the MyProject project with target date 2025-06-01

promptTemplates.title: Update milestone
promptTemplates.prompt: Update milestone abc123 to have name v2.1 Release and new target date 2025-07-15

promptTemplates.title: Milestone with description
promptTemplates.prompt: Create milestone Q2 Launch in MobileApp project with description Major feature release with new onboarding flow

promptTemplates.title: Batch updates
promptTemplates.prompt: Update milestone def456 with new target date and set description to Revised deadline based on dependency updates

bestPractices: Store LINEAR_API_KEY securely in environment variables or .env files
Use JSON output when integrating with scripts or CI/CD pipelines
Verify milestone IDs using list commands before performing updates
antiPatterns: Hardcoding API keys in scripts or version control
Using milestone IDs from memory without verification
Skipping the --json flag when parsing output programmatically

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for milestone management tasks.

faq.question: What are the rate limits?
faq.answer: Rate limits follow Linear API limits. Check your Linear plan for specific quotas.

faq.question: How do I integrate with other tools?
faq.answer: Use JSON output with --json flag and pipe to other CLI tools or scripts.

faq.question: Is my API key secure?
faq.answer: Keys are passed to Linear API only. Never commit keys to version control.

faq.question: Why is my command failing?
faq.answer: Verify LINEAR_API_KEY is set, project name exists, and milestone IDs are valid UUIDs.

faq.question: How does this compare to the web UI?
faq.answer: CLI enables faster operations and scripting compared to manual web interface work.
